import React from "react"; function Menu({ loading, categories, category, setCategory, search, setSearch, featuredFoods, filteredFoods, addToCart }) { return ( <>

Popular Picks

) : (

{food.category} ⭐ {food.rating}

{food.name}

Freshly prepared and ideal for fast campus pickup.

₹{food.price} {food.prepTime} min
))}
)}

Explore Menu

Search food, filter categories, and add items to cart.

setSearch(e.target.value)} />
{categories.map((item) => ( ))}
{loading ? (
Loading menu...
) : filteredFoods.length === 0 ? (
No matching food items found.
) : (
{filteredFoods.map((food) => (
{food.category} ⭐ {food.rating}

{food.name}

Freshly prepared and ideal for fast campus pickup.

₹{food.price} {food.prepTime} min
))}
)}
); } export default Menu;
